defaultTitle: Kristian Hans Onjala | Full-Stack Engineer, STEM Educator, Builder
defaultDescription: Kristian Hans Onjala is a full-stack software engineer, STEM educator, and cofounder based in Nairobi, Kenya. He builds production software, mentors international robotics teams, and has shipped 17 projects across full-stack, mobile, IoT, and AI.
author: Kristian Hans Onjala
